headline: T-Mobile is booting customers from its oldest plans
summary: T-Mobile is retiring many legacy plans and moving customers to new options. Plans dating back to the 3G era are affected by this change. The move has prompted widespread customer backlash on platforms like Reddit.

headline: After a great start, DC’s new cinematic universe is already slowing down
summary: DC's new cinematic universe is reportedly experiencing a slowdown after an initial strong start. Plans for a standalone Supergirl film after Superman are viewed as dubious. Critics question Warner Bros. Discovery's strategy for expanding the DCU.

headline: Leaked iPhone 18 Pro photos reportedly wound up on the dark web
summary: Leaked iPhone 18 Pro photos and parts lists have appeared on the dark web. The leak follows a data breach at a key Apple supplier. Images reportedly show a drop-tested iPhone 18 Pro with a three-camera layout.

headline: Tidal won’t pay royalties on AI-generated music but isn’t banning it outright
summary: Tidal will no longer pay royalties for 100% AI-generated music, effective immediately. Starting July 15th, identified AI tracks will feature a special icon for listeners. The new policy aims to protect artists and inform its user base.

headline: Persona Live-Action TV Show in the Works at Netflix
summary: A live-action Persona TV show is reportedly in development. Netflix is behind the upcoming adaptation. Further details about the series are currently under wraps.

headline: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 Teaser Features Cyberpunk 2077 Locations Set to Show Up in New Season
summary: The first teaser for Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 has been released. Fans have identified iconic Cyberpunk 2077 locations within the teaser. The new season promises to revisit familiar settings from the game.

headline: The 10 Most Anticipated TV Shows to Stream in July
summary: Discover the 10 most anticipated TV shows set to stream this July. The list features a diverse range of genres, from caped crusaders to multiversal threats. Includes picks for every viewer, even a story about a washed-up golfer.

headline: Why The Back-to-Back Street Fighter 6 Evo Champion, MenaRD, Switched Off His Main in the Finals
summary: Evo Champion MenaRD explained his surprising character switch in the Street Fighter 6 finals. He opted to play a different character, abandoning his usual main. The decision occurred during the tournament's highest stakes matches.

headline: Chris Mason: Burnham revels on public stage but has little time to hammer ideas into shape
summary: Andy Burnham, eyeing prime ministerial ambitions, is making a significant political move. He thrives on public appearances but struggles to fully develop his policy ideas. Political editor Chris Mason provides a critical assessment of Burnham's approach.

headline: Refugees will be told to repay up to £10,000 under new asylum rules
summary: New asylum rules will mandate refugees to repay up to £10,000 in support costs. Ministers will gain powers to recover these expenses from adults. The legislation targets those who have received asylum assistance.

headline: Pupil put in isolation booth for more than half a school year, BBC learns
summary: A Yorkshire pupil was placed in an isolation booth for over half a school year. This case highlights significant concerns about zero-tolerance behaviour policies. The BBC investigation uncovers the extreme disciplinary measure.

headline: One big win and three defeats for Trump in dramatic day at Supreme Court
summary: Donald Trump experienced a dramatic and mixed day at the Supreme Court. He secured a significant victory expanding presidential power over regulators. However, three other Supreme Court decisions resulted in major setbacks for his agenda.
